metadata.title: EstiHub - Estonia tax and housing insights
metadata.description: Compare Estonian tax regimes and explore Tallinn rental data for expats and entrepreneurs.

header.tagline: Estonia essentials for builders and expats

hero.title: Plan your work, taxes, and next apartment in Estonia.
hero.description: EstiHub brings practical tax comparisons and Tallinn rental signals into one fast, multilingual workspace for people building their life or company in Estonia.

proof.tax: Compare employment, board member, FIE, and entrepreneur account regimes.
proof.housing: Explore district-level Tallinn rent data as the housing dashboard grows.
proof.i18n: Use the product in English, Estonian, or Russian from day one.

status.title: Backend status
status.description: Server-rendered health check from the FastAPI service.
status.onlineHelp: The API responded successfully and is ready for frontend integrations.
status.offlineHelp: The page is still available; start the backend locally to restore live data.
